metadata.description: AnyModel Gateway for Claude Code — a local multi-model gateway that routes Claude Code requests to any OpenAI-compatible model (Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, Qwen, Groq, and more). Zero-dependency Node.js proxy with full tool_use conversion.

plugins.name: anymodel-for-claude-code
plugins.description: Local multi-model gateway for Claude Code — route requests to 8 providers / 21 models through one OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Full tool_use two-way conversion, zero dependencies, Windows-friendly.
